event.name: F1 Belgian Grand Prix 2026 — Spa-Francorchamps (Wet Conditions)

context.home_team: Wet weather specialist (P3 qualifier, known wet specialist)
context.away_team: Dominant qualifier (P1 by 0.4s in dry qualifying)
context.pre_match_notes: Race day: heavy rain at start. Wet weather race conditions. P1 qualifier dominant in dry but not known as wet specialist. P3 qualifier has 4 wet weather wins in last 3 seasons. Spa in wet conditions: Eau Rouge/Raidillon approach changes significantly. Qualifying delta inverted in wet races historically.

question: Does the qualifying delta signal hold in wet conditions, or does the wet specialist modifier override it?

verified_outcome.key_variable: wet_weather_specialist_modifier overrides qualifying_delta — wet conditions nullify dry pace advantage
